title: staleness reconcile-stale artifact-graph skills
purpose: E5.3 defines staleness reconcile stale artifact graph skills for the agent-driven expert system. Knowledge & composition — catalog, compose-first, staleness.
scope: Owns `E5.3` only; siblings under `E5` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §7 — Branch E — Knowledge & composition plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#7-branch-e-knowledge-composition-plane).
behavior_steps: When staleness.json or a program artifact graph flags stale nodes on paths in the next implement scope, the conductor invokes reconcile-stale or reconcile-artifact-graph before spawning workers—not after partial edits land.

S0 scripts maintain stale flags file-derived; the reconcile skills decide whether to rerun the affected design phase, waive with H2 operator approval, or enqueue hierarchy deepen items for impacted ids.
Workers on affected paths pause while reconciliation runs; pursuit resumes only after flags clear or an explicit H2 waiver is dual-written to journal and state.json.

In program mode, reconcile-artifact-graph consults [C4.4](C4.4-artifact-graph-per-program-and-pack.md) cross-stream contracts alongside [E5.1](E5.1-staleness-design-graph-staleness-json.md) as the design-graph source of truth.
If implement spawn would proceed against stale design without reconciliation or waiver, pursuit halts at H2—silent implement violates Plane E contract and invalidates goal_verify evidence.

Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.

**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.

Create or extend S0 script if behavior is file-derived.
Add unit test under tests/unit/test_e5_3.py when script exists.
Validate `E5.3` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `E5.3` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `E5.3`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: E5.3 defines staleness reconcile stale artifact graph skills for the agent-driven expert system. Knowledge & composition — catalog, compose-first, staleness. In practice, the system when staleness.json or a program artifact graph flags stale nodes on paths in the next implement scope, the conductor invokes reconcile-stale or reconcile-artifact-graph before spawning workers—not after partial edits land, then s0 scripts maintain stale flags file-derived; the reconcile skills decide whether to rerun the affected design phase, waive with h2 operator approval, or enqueue hierarchy deepen items for impacted ids.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-e 2026-06-28 -->

reconcile-stale and reconcile-artifact-graph skills plan reruns or operator approval when staleness.json or program artifact graphs flag stale nodes. Conductor invokes before implement spawn on affected paths; workers pause until reconciliation clears flags or H2 waiver records.

S0 scripts mark stale; skills decide rerun vs waive vs deepen hierarchy queue. Pair with [C4.4](C4.4-artifact-graph-per-program-and-pack.md) for program mode and [E5.1](E5.1-staleness-design-graph-staleness-json.md) for design graph source. Silent implement against stale design violates Plane E contract and undermines goal_verify evidence.
